neighbourhoods.name: Kreuzberg
neighbourhoods.description: Highest creative density in Berlin. Strong youth and design audience. Multiple retail touchpoints within walking distance. Primary recommendation for cultural launchpad.

neighbourhoods.name: Mitte
neighbourhoods.description: Premium visibility. Highest gallery concentration. Tourism footfall. Best for flagship brand moments and media-facing activations.

neighbourhoods.name: Friedrichshain
neighbourhoods.description: Nightlife and music hub. Strong under-30 demographic. Best for guerrilla activation and experiential events. Lower retail density.

neighbourhoods.name: Neukolln
neighbourhoods.description: Emerging creative cluster. Lower cost for experimentation. Growing design community. Good for early community building before scaling.

neighbourhoods.name: Charlottenburg
neighbourhoods.description: Established premium retail area. Older demographic. UdK design school nearby. Better for retail support than cultural activation. Highest U-Bahn OOH density.

neighbourhoods.name: Prenzlauer Berg
neighbourhoods.description: Family-oriented creative area. Design-conscious consumers 30-40. Secondary market for ecosystem retail once Berlin is established.
